idea-plugin.name: ArchMap
idea-plugin.description:
ArchMap (v1): import graph for JavaScript/TypeScript (js, jsx, mjs, cjs, ts, tsx) in IntelliJ IDEA Community.

What v1 shows: directed edges mean one file imports another via a resolved relative path — module/file dependency only.

Not in v1: React parent/child at runtime, props flow, or state lifting (planned for a later AST-based phase).

Interactive Cytoscape view: hierarchical tree layout, zoom, pan, and a short on-screen guide for beginners.
